# Starfly — machine-readable doc index
# https://starfly.dev/llms.txt

> Starfly is a non-human identity broker. RFC 8693 token exchange, WIMSE JWTs, OPA policy, CAEP revocation, MCP tool verification, federation sync.

## Site

- https://starfly.dev — product home
- https://starfly.dev/play — sandbox playground (bootstrap + five use cases)
- https://starfly.dev/docs/ — documentation hub

## Repository

- https://github.com/raygj/project-starfly-fabrics — public source (code + docs + website)

## Agent bootstrap

- AGENTS.md — read first for Cursor/Claude agents
- sandbox/manifest.yaml — profiles, use cases, screenshot map
- sandbox/run.sh — run proof use cases

## Tutorials

- docs/getting-started.md — clone, build, dev mode, first exchange (<15 min)

## Explanation

- docs/glossary.md — trust domain vs audience, PEP, WIMSE, federation
- docs/concepts/trust-domains.md — issuer-side identity boundary
- docs/concepts/exchange.md — 124ns hot path invariant
- docs/concepts/revocation.md — 30ms kill switch invariant

## How-to (integrators)

- docs/integrators/token-exchange.md — RFC 8693 exchange, subject_token_type table
- docs/integrators/mcp.md — tool registration, verify, confused deputy mitigation

## Reference

- api/openapi.yaml — REST API contract
- GET /v1/sys/health — PEP health
- GET /v1/identity/jwks — signing keys
- POST /v1/exchange/token — token exchange
- POST /v1/mcp/verify — MCP tool verification
- POST /v1/signals/events — CAEP/SSF ingestion

## Invariants (never violate in suggestions)

- 124ns exchange hot path — no new synchronous deps on exchange pipeline
- 30ms revocation kill switch — propagation latency not negotiable
